title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 45.
content:
There was an Old Person of Prague,
    Who was suddenly seized with the plague;
    But they gave him some butter,
    Which caused him to mutter,
    And cured that Old Person of Prague.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 45."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
